Cell.Data: Anything between straight brackets - i.e. [ ] - is a formatting tag. Do not change these tags and keep them in the same relative position in the text. Anything between curly brackets - i.e. { } - is a place where text or numbers will be inserted by the game. Do not change the tag, but feel free to change its position in the text to suit the localized text.
Call in a Laser Strike at the target that deals {LaserDamage} damage with [abilityred]Massive Impact[/abilityred] and has {BurningChance} strength chance to inflict [abilityred]Burning[/abilityred].

Wzywa ostrzał laserowy, który razi wskazany cel i zadaje {LaserDamage} pkt. obrażeń z efektem [abilityred]potężnego uderzenia[/abilityred] i ma szansę ({BurningChance} siły) na spowodowanie [abilityred]oparzenia[/abilityred].

Bathe the battlefield in Thermal energy, reducing the defenses of enemy units by {ShieldReduction} and {ThermalResistance} for {StarlightDuration}. Also, enemy units have a have strength {BlindStrength} chance to become [abilityred]Blinded[/abilityred] for {BlindDuration}

Pokrywa pole bitwy energią cieplną obniżającą obronę jednostek wroga ({ShieldReduction} i {ThermalResistance} na {StarlightDuration}). Wrogie jednostki mają też szansę ({BlindStrength} siły), by staćsię [abilityred]oślepione[/abilityred] na {BlindDuration}.
Deal {AblationDamage} damage with [abilityred]Massive Impact[/abilityred] to target unit, bypassing and removing {ArmorRemoved} and {ShieldsRemoved}.
Zadaje wskazanej jednostce {AblationDamage} pkt. obrażeń z efektem [abilityred]potężnego uderzenia[/abilityred]. Omija i usuwa {ArmorRemoved} i {ShieldsRemoved}.

Fire a blinding Laser beam, dealing {PhotonicDamage} damage in a 1 hex radius. All enemy units hit by this ability have {PhotonicBlindChance} strength chance to be [abilityred]Blinded[/abilityred], decreasing their accuracy for {PhotonicBlindTurn}.

Strzela oślepiającą wiązką lasera w obszar o promieniu 1 pola, zadając {PhotonicDamage} pkt. obrażeń. Każda wroga jednostka znajdująca się na tym obszarze ma szansę ({PhotonicBlindChance} siły), że zostanie [abilityred]oślepiona[/abilityred], co zmniejszy jej celność na {PhotonicBlindTurn}.

In the text below, any inserted strings - anything of the form {text} - is replaced by an integer value for the thing described in the brackets. If the {text} is not followed by a unit - e.g. shields, hitpoints - the icon for the unit is inserted together with the integer. The same holds for symbols - e.g. '+', '%' - which are occasionally inserted together with the integer.
For references to game terminology and in-world references, please check the glossary delivered as part of the documentation.
